Developed by the ancient [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanians]], '''Arkanian bond armor''' used a number of special alloys that lost heat at a very slow rate, offering protection from sudden drops in temperature. A bonded form of laminate was used which made them durable though somewhat inflexible.

{{Tech-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Arkanian bond armor was intended to appear in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' but it was removed from the final version of the game. As the armor was still present in the game files, it could be obtained using cheat codes.
